title: デビュー戦の後に・届け笠松の空へ

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Good question... I think I managed to show them
all what I was capable of.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
If I keep winning at the central level, it's only a
matter of time before people back home start
hearing about me—

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text:
Hey, about Oguri Cap... Y'know, the one who just
ran? What's she like?

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text:
Umm... I heard she was really famous around her
hometown. Personally, I don't know much about
her though.

On the way back to the academy from Oguri
Cap's race...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: ...Hey. What do you think we should do next?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I know I need to keep racing, but is that really
enough?

She seems lost in thought. I figure she's troubled
by the comments she overheard from those
spectators after the race.

She's right. She may be the talk of the academy,
but she's not exactly a household name yet.
There's only one way to change that.
choice_data_list: Just enter as many races as you can.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: As many as I can, huh? So I just have to run a lot?

Oguri Cap is still relatively unknown, but that just
means we have to show them how powerful and
charming she really is.
choice_data_list:
Let's prove to everyone that you're central
race-level material!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I gotta run until the folks back home hear my
name!

Oguri Cap's eyes are sparkling with ambition.
There's no doubt in my mind that she'll do
amazingly in her upcoming races.
